languages.text: {n}Пребывая в собственных покоях и наслаждаясь долгожданным отдыхом, вы неожиданно испытываете странное ощущение — на уровне животных инстинктов. Казалось бы, двери заперты, и проникновение в покои без вашего ведома невозможно... и все же — вы не одни.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Пребывая в собственных покоях и наслаждаясь долгожданным отдыхом, вы неожиданно испытываете странное ощущение — на уровне животных инстинктов. Казалось бы, двери заперты, и проникновение в покои без вашего ведома невозможно... и все же — вы не одни.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пребывая в собственных покоях и наслаждаясь долгожданным отдыхом, вы неожиданно испытываете странное ощущение — на уровне животных инстинктов. Казалось бы, двери заперты, и проникновение в покои без вашего ведома невозможно... и все же — вы не одни.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

{n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

{n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你在房间中享受久违的休息，突然一阵异样的感觉袭来，那是种近乎野兽本能的直觉。房门分明锁着，也没人能在不惊动你的情况下闯入，然而你却感觉……你并非独自一人。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你在房间中享受久违的休息，突然一阵异样的感觉袭来，那是种近乎野兽本能的直觉。房门分明锁着，也没人能在不惊动你的情况下闯入，然而你却感觉……你并非独自一人。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Estás en tus aposentos, disfrutando de un merecido descanso, cuando sientes una sensación extraña; prácticamente un instinto animal. Las puertas están cerradas y nadie puede haber entrado aquí sin alertarte, pero, aun así... no estás sol{mf|o|a}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Estás en tus aposentos, disfrutando de un merecido descanso, cuando sientes una sensación extraña; prácticamente un instinto animal. Las puertas están cerradas y nadie puede haber entrado aquí sin alertarte, pero, aun así... no estás sol{mf|o|a}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous vous trouvez dans vos quartiers, profitant d'un repos bien mérité, lorsqu'une étrange sensation vous traverse, de l'ordre d'un instinct animal. Les portes semblent bien verrouillées, et personne n'aurait pu s'introduire dans vos quartiers à votre insu, et pourtant... vous n'êtes pas {mf|seul|seule}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous vous trouvez dans vos quartiers, profitant d'un repos bien mérité, lorsqu'une étrange sensation vous traverse, de l'ordre d'un instinct animal. Les portes semblent bien verrouillées, et personne n'aurait pu s'introduire dans vos quartiers à votre insu, et pourtant... vous n'êtes pas {mf|seul|seule}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Odanda uzun zamandır beklediğin dinlenme anının tadını çıkarırken hayvani içgüdü seviyesinde tuhaf bir hisse kapılıyorsun. Kapılar kilitli görünüyor ve kimse haberin olmadan odana giremez. Yine de... Yalnız değilsin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Odanda uzun zamandır beklediğin dinlenme anının tadını çıkarırken hayvani içgüdü seviyesinde tuhaf bir hisse kapılıyorsun. Kapılar kilitli görünüyor ve kimse haberin olmadan odana giremez. Yine de... Yalnız değilsin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du genießt in deinen Gemächern deine wohlverdiente Ruhe, als dich ein seltsames Gefühl ereilt, das dem Instinkt eines Tieres gleicht. Die Türen scheinen verschlossen zu sein. Niemand hätte ohne dein Wissen eintreten können und doch ... bist du nicht allein.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du genießt in deinen Gemächern deine wohlverdiente Ruhe, als dich ein seltsames Gefühl ereilt, das dem Instinkt eines Tieres gleicht. Die Türen scheinen verschlossen zu sein. Niemand hätte ohne dein Wissen eintreten können und doch ... bist du nicht allein.{/n}

languages.text: {n}長年の休息を満喫していた貴殿の部屋に、動物の本能レベルで感じる奇妙な感覚が襲いかかる。部屋の扉は施錠されており、誰にも知られずに貴殿の部屋に侵入する者はいないはずだが…貴殿は一人ではない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are in your chambers enjoying some long-awaited rest, when you are struck by a strange sensation, something at the level of animal instinct. The doors seem to be locked, and no one could have entered your chambers without your knowledge, and yet... you are not alone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}長年の休息を満喫していた貴殿の部屋に、動物の本能レベルで感じる奇妙な感覚が襲いかかる。部屋の扉は施錠されており、誰にも知られずに貴殿の部屋に侵入する者はいないはずだが…貴殿は一人ではない。{/n}
